rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion To Compel Contractual Arbitration
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for May 2, 2017 line 1. PETITIONER DANIEL SHAPERO's Motion To Compel Contractual Arbitration OFF CALENDAR, insufficient notice per CCP 1005. Per the Proof of Service filed on April 28, 2017 the motion was served on April 12, 2017, i.e. 14 court days before the hearing. The Court also notes that there is no petition to compel arbitration on file.= (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: GENE MICHALAK VS. JPMORGAN CHASE BANK, N.A., ABUSINESS ENTITY FORM ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for May 2, 2017 line 2. DEFENDANT JPMORGAN CHASE BANK, N.A.'s DEMURRER to COMPLAINT Defendant to provide a declaration regarding service of the motion on the attorney of record, Plaintiff in pro per no later than 9:00 a.m. on May 2, 2017. Amended Proof of Service for the Demurrer and for the Notice of Non-Opposition indicates that someone other than attorney of record was served. Court records indicates that Plaintiff is currently in pro per. Michael Mehr is not Plaintiff's attorney of record. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: MARIAN B MOHR VS. EAST WEST BANK A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for May 2, 2017 line 3. DEFENDANT EAST WEST BANK A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION's DEMURRER to 2ND Amended COMPLAINT OVERRULED, 10 days to answer. Plaintiff alleges sufficient facts to support a claim of waste based on implied assumption of assignor's liability. The Court will not consider extrinsic evidence on demurrer.= (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: ALFONZO PORTILLO VS. SWARAN SINGH ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for May 2, 2017 line 4. DEFENDANTs SWARAN SINGH and KAPAL SINGH's DEMURRER to COMPLAINT Continued to June 1, 2017. Moving party is ordered to comply with SFLR 2.7B and provide courtesy copy of moving papers, reply and the operative complaint to Department 501 no later than May 12, 2017 with a cover letter reflecting new hearing date.= (501/REQ)
